user.title: FP2 Zone Manager
user.description:
Set up FP2 Zone Manager to automatically control lights based on Aqara FP2 presence zones.

After setup, use Configure to add zone mappings.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Use Configure to manage zones.

init.title: Zone Mappings
init.description: Manage your FP2 presence zone to light mappings.

select_sensor.title: Select Presence Sensor
select_sensor.description: Choose which FP2 presence zone triggers this mapping.

select_target.title: Select Target Type
select_target.description: Control an entire area (all lights in a room) or specific entities.

configure_area.title: Configure Area Target
configure_area.description:
Select the area to control and optional settings.

Group: Link multiple sensors together so lights only turn off when ALL sensors in the group are clear.

configure_entities.title: Configure Entity Targets
configure_entities.description:
Select specific lights/switches to control.

Group: Link multiple sensors together so lights only turn off when ALL sensors in the group are clear.
